title: FedRAMP Common Definitions
description: Shared type definitions referenced by other FedRAMP schemas.

certificationPackageOverviewUri.title: Certification Package Overview
certificationPackageOverviewUri.description: Full URI of the provider's Certification Package Overview document.

nRating.title: Potential Agency Impact N-Rating
nRating.description: See VER-EVA-EPA or IEC-CSO-EFI for N1–N5 definitions.

detectionSource.title: Detection Source
detectionSource.description: Tool or activity that identified the vulnerability (e.g., scanner, penetration test, bug bounty).

vulnerabilityDetail.title: Vulnerability Detail
vulnerabilityDetail.description: Required information for a single detected vulnerability per VER-RPT-VDT.

providerTrackingId.title: Provider Tracking ID
providerTrackingId.description: Provider's internally assigned identifier for this vulnerability.

evaluationCompletedAt.title: Evaluation Completed At
evaluationCompletedAt.description: When evaluation was completed. The clock for VER-TFR-MAV runs from this date.

isLikelyExploitable.title: Is Likely Exploitable
isLikelyExploitable.description: LEV classification per VER-EVA-ELX and VER-EVA-AIA.

currentRating.title: Current Rating
currentRating.description: Currently estimated Potential Agency Impact N-rating.

projectedNextReduction.title: Projected Next Reduction
projectedNextReduction.description: Next planned mitigation step. Omit if fully mitigated or none planned.

overdueStatus.title: Overdue Status
overdueStatus.description: See VER-TFR-EVU and VER-TFR-MAV for overdue definitions.

acceptedVulnerabilityInfo.title: Accepted Vulnerability Info
acceptedVulnerabilityInfo.description: Required information for a single accepted vulnerability per VER-RPT-AVI.

acceptanceRationale.title: Acceptance Rationale
acceptanceRationale.description: Explanation of why this is an accepted vulnerability.
